scripts.dev:extension: npm run native:install -w main && npm run dev:extension -w main
scripts.build:extension: npm run build:extension -w main && npm run native:install -w main
scripts.dev:tauri: concurrently -k "npm run dev:desktop-renderer -w main" "wait-on tcp:4173 && cd tauri-app && cargo tauri dev"
scripts.build:tauri: npm run build:desktop-renderer -w main && cd tauri-app && cargo tauri build
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:tauri && rm -rf mac-app && mkdir -p mac-app && cp -R tauri-app/target/release/bundle/macos/*.app mac-app/ && cp tauri-app/target/release/bundle/dmg/*.dmg mac-app/ && xattr -cr mac-app/*.app && codesign --force --deep --sign - mac-app/*.app && xattr -cr mac-app/*.dmg
scripts.build:windows: npm run build:desktop-renderer -w main && rm -rf windows-app && mkdir -p windows-app && cd tauri-app && cargo xwin build --release --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc && cd .. && cp tauri-app/target/x86_64-pc-windows-msvc/release/k-warning-check-desktop.exe windows-app/ && cp tauri-app/icons/icon.ico windows-app/
